$description: Registered enrichment sources. Each entry binds a tool atom to its parser module and carries tool-specific tunables. severity_map keys are tool-emitted categories/checks; values are info|warning|error. default_severity applies when severity_map has no entry. Adding a tool: write the parser, append an entry here, restart the daemon.

sources.$severity_note: Credo's 'warning' category is misleadingly named — these are real bugs (IEx.pry left in code, String.to_atom on user input, RaiseInsideRescue), not cautions. Map to error.
